summary: FaraLink POS App - Categories Management & Excel Import Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed and 11 frontend tests passed. New features for Excel product import and category management are fully functional.

backend: GET /api/products/categories/list returns all categories (merged from products + dedicated categories collection)
POST /api/categories with {nom: 'TestCat'} creates a new category
POST /api/categories with duplicate name returns 400 error
POST /api/categories with empty name returns 400 error
POST /api/products/import-excel with a valid .xlsx file imports products and returns count
POST /api/products/import-excel with invalid file returns 400 error
POST /api/products/import-excel skips products with duplicate codes
New product can use categories from /api/products/categories/list
frontend: Categories button exists on Products page
Import button exists on Products page
Categories modal opens with input field and add button
Categories list container displays existing categories
Adding a new category from modal works and appears in list
Import modal opens with Download Template button
File upload input exists in Import modal
Confirm Import button exists in Import modal
Product category dropdown (select) exists in new product form
Category dropdown is populated with 7+ categories from API
POS page shows category filter buttons (8 including 'Tous')

seed_data_creation: Test categories and products created/deleted during testing (cleanup performed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Excel import and category management) are working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_categories_import.py cover: categories CRUD (list, create, delete, duplicate check), Excel import (template download, valid import, invalid file rejection, duplicate skipping). Frontend tests verified: Categories modal opens and lists categories, adding new category works, Import modal has download template and file upload, product form category dropdown is populated from API, POS category filter buttons show all categories.

excel_import.template_download: PASS - GET /api/products/import-template returns valid .xlsx with proper headers
excel_import.import_products: PASS - POST /api/products/import-excel imports products from valid Excel files
excel_import.duplicate_handling: PASS - Skips products with existing codes

category_management.duplicate_rejection: PASS - Returns 400 for duplicate category names
category_management.frontend_modal: PASS - Categories modal opens, lists, adds, deletes categories
category_management.product_form_dropdown: PASS - Category dropdown populated from API
category_management.pos_category_filter: PASS - POS shows all categories as filter buttons
